name: Fresh Tuna, Black Olive and Red Pepper Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 Red bell peppers; roasted, peeled and seeded -O
1 small Bunch basil, cut into fine
1 small Head red leaf lettuce, leaves separated, washed
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the tuna steaks with 1 tablespoon of olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
2. Grill over hot coals for 8 to 10 minutes, turning once, or broil under a hot broiler for about the same length of time. Allow the tuna to cool.
3. Break the cooled tuna into 1-1/2 inch chunks using two forks.
4. In a large bowl, combine the tuna, peppers, celery, olives, and basil.
5. Mix the remaining olive oil with the lemon juice, oregano (if using), salt, and pepper in a small bowl.
6. Pour the dressing over the tuna mixture and toss gently.
7. Serve the salad on lettuce leaves.
